intro: Hippeastrum stellare, commonly known as the Star-bulb Amaryllis, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family, known for its bright and vibrant flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and respiratory infections.
